grid_capability: cap #1 — LoRA strength sweep (single-pod warm-reuse, generate cells)

runs.outcome: status=teardown (false-positive — RunPod pods=[] but `kinoforge list` sweeper bookkeeping rows tripped the residual-pod regex)
runs.took_branch_fix: fix(grid): residual-pod check ignores sweeper bookkeeping rows (commit 257f23b)

runs.per_cell_mp4_persistence: wiped at compose by shutil.rmtree(tmp_dir) — fixed in commit 5368832 so future grid runs preserve per-cell mp4s; T5's per-cell artifacts are not recoverable from this run.
runs.took_branch_fix: fix(grid): preserve per-cell tmp_dir on success (commit 5368832)

acceptance_evidence.three_sha_distinct_cells: indirect — composed mp4 visibly contains 3 distinct strength variants; per-cell shas not captured because tmp_dir was rmtreed pre-fix
acceptance_evidence.kinoforge_list_clean: yes — only sweeper bookkeeping rows; no pod rows (provider=runpod absent post-run)
acceptance_evidence.spend_within_cap: estimated ~$0.30 total across both runs (3 cold-boot pods per run @ $0.27/hr × ~7-10min each); pod-pool warm-reuse did not engage between cells, separate concern
acceptance_evidence.fixture_mp4_copied: examples/configs/grids/_fixtures/wan21_strength_cell0.mp4 — cropped 480x480 cell-0 region from composed mp4 via ffmpeg (origin: cell 0 of run 2)

orchestrator_bugs_surfaced_and_fixed_dur: residual-pod check false-positives on sweeper bookkeeping rows (commit 257f23b)
rmtree wipes per-cell mp4s on success preventing fixture harvest (commit 5368832)
